title: auth/DoA/doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:8 › Delegated Organisation - Notification Creation › Isabel Irwin (Plant Org 1 member) creates → notification assigned to Plant Org 1
traceRole: This trace itself renders the BASELINE (org member, NOT an agent) — a Plant Org 1 member creating a CHED-PP. Because the creator is a plain member and not a delegated agent, the organisation-selection page does NOT render and the responsible-person/organisation block is auto-derived from the member's own identity + org. The delegated-AGENT surface (organisation picker, Trade Partner badge, change-org-before-submit, contact/importer auto-population from a delegated org) lives in sibling tests of the SAME spec and two sibling specs (doa-agent-access, doa-importer-access); those are captured here from the QA source (inferred/legacy) because they are the exact gap the main run never exercised.
pagesTouched: organisation-selection (agent-only; NOT rendered in this member trace)

reviewNotification.personResponsibleBloc.trace: 6e71cf94f89d27e643a2c97d05b67b153700b499 action 172 (snapshot after call@172, Review Notification page)
reviewNotification.personResponsibleBloc.note: This whole block is auto-populated from the signed-in user's identity + associated organisation; there is no contact-details entry page in the member journey. #responsible-organisation-name = 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1' is the assertion target that proves org assignment.

reviewNotification.template.detail: Row order + copy + dom ids: dt id='responsible-person' 'Responsible person' = personResponsible.name; 'Telephone' = personResponsible.phone; 'Email' = personResponsible.email; dt id='responsible-organisation-name' 'Organisation Name' = personResponsible.companyName; 'Organisation Address' = personResponsible.address; 'Organisation Telephone' = personResponsible.phone. Gated by {{#if displayPersonResponsible}}.

values.warning: You must use the correct reference and code on the customs declaration or your consignment will be delayed.
values.whatYouNeedToDo: Tell the haulier that this consignment does not need an inspection. Initial risk assessments can change.
values.whatHappensNext: An inspector may update the risk assessment. If the risk assessment changes, IPAFFS will notify you and any nominated contacts by text message or email.

newSurface: The delegated-agent (DoA) journey adds an ORGANISATION-SELECTION step and rewrites who a notification belongs to. (1) Organisation selection page — for agents only, it renders immediately AFTER the Import Type page and BEFORE Country of Origin (workflow gates it on organisationName/useOwnOrganisation; a plain member like Isabel skips it entirely, as this trace confirms). Its controls: a radio 'A different organisation' which reveals a second radio list of delegated companies (agent picks e.g. 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1'), plus a radio for the agent's own organisation labelled 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C'; buttons 'Save and continue' and (when entered via amend) 'Save and review'. (2) When an agent creates FOR a delegated org, the responsible contact + importer blocks are auto-populated from that delegated org, not the agent: contact name 'Isabel Irwin', email 'ipaffs-plant-org-1-isabel@mailinator.com', telephone '0123456789', importer 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1' with address 'KAINOS SOFTWARE LTD, 4-6, UPPER CRESCENT, BELFAST, BT7 1NT' (dom ids #responsible-contact-name / #responsible-contact-email / #responsible-contact-telephone / #importer / #responsible-organisation-name). (3) Trade Partner badge — an agent-submitted notification shows on the dashboard status cell (#status-0) as status 'New' plus a 'Trade Partner' marker, distinguishing agent-created work from the org's own. (4) Change organisation before submit — from the review page the agent can hit 'Amend', follow #organisation-change-link back to the org-selection page, switch to their own org ('IPAFFS Plant Agency C') via 'Save and review', then declare + submit; the notification's responsible organisation flips to the newly-chosen org. None of this surface appears in a member journey.

organisationSelectionPage.position: After Import Type page, before Country of Origin page (agents only)

controls.radio_differentOrganisation: 'A different organisation' -> reveals company radio list -> select company by name (e.g. 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1') -> 'Save and continue'
controls.radio_ownOrganisation: 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C' (agent's own org) -> 'Save and continue' (or 'Save and review' when amending)

tradePartnerBadge.detail: Dashboard status cell #notifications-page #status-0 contains BOTH 'New' and 'Trade Partner' for an agent-created (delegated) notification.

values.#importer: IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1 / KAINOS SOFTWARE LTD, 4-6, UPPER CRESCENT, BELFAST, BT7 1NT

contactImporterAutoPopulation.note: Populated from the DELEGATED org, not the acting agent. Assertions use expect.soft.

changeOrganisationBeforeSubmit.flow: review page btnAmend ('Amend') -> #organisation-change-link ('Change organisation') -> org-selection: check own-org radio 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C' + 'Save and review' -> review 'Save and continue' -> declaration checkbox -> 'Submit notification'. Result: responsible-organisation-name flips to 'IPAFFS Plant Agency C'.

authorizationRules: MEMBER CREATE (this trace, confirmed): a Plant Org 1 member (Isabel Irwin) creating a CHED-PP produces a notification whose responsible organisation IS Plant Org 1 — #responsible-organisation-name = 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1'; no org-selection step is offered.

AGENT CREATE FOR DELEGATED ORG (inferred, doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:33-63): an agent (Carol Clark) creating for 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1' produces a notification assigned to Plant Org 1, shown on the dashboard with status 'New' and a 'Trade Partner' badge.

AGENT CHANGE-ORG BEFORE SUBMIT (inferred, doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:65-111): an agent may amend a draft created for Plant Org 1 and switch the responsible organisation to their OWN org ('IPAFFS Plant Agency C') before submitting; the submitted notification is then assigned to Plant Agency C.

AGENT AUTO-POPULATION (inferred, doa-notification-creation.spec.ts:113-140): when the agent creates for Plant Org 1, contact (Isabel Irwin / ipaffs-plant-org-1-isabel@mailinator.com / 0123456789) and importer (IPAFFS Plant Organisation 1, KAINOS SOFTWARE LTD, 4-6, UPPER CRESCENT, BELFAST, BT7 1NT) are auto-populated from the DELEGATED org, not the agent.

VISIBILITY — AGENT SUBMIT -> ORG MEMBER SEES (inferred, doa-agent-access.spec.ts:7-32 & doa-importer-access.spec.ts:7-32): agent submits for Plant Org 1 -> Plant Org 1 member (Isabel) CAN view, Copy-as-new and Amend the notification on her dashboard.
VISIBILITY — AGENT SUBMIT -> AGENT SEES (inferred, doa-agent-access.spec.ts:34-58): agent submits for Plant Org 1 -> the AGENT (Carol) CAN also view, Copy-as-new and Amend it on her own dashboard.

VISIBILITY — AGENT SUBMIT FOR OWN ORG -> ORG MEMBER CANNOT SEE (inferred, doa-agent-access.spec.ts:60-86): agent submits for her OWN org (Plant Agency C) -> Plant Org 1 member CANNOT find it (view-details hidden).

VISIBILITY — AGENT DRAFT (not submitted) -> ORG MEMBER CANNOT SEE (inferred, doa-importer-access.spec.ts:34-58): agent DRAFTS for Plant Org 1 but does not submit -> Plant Org 1 member CANNOT find the DRAFT.GB.* draft; only submitted notifications become visible to org members.

VISIBILITY — SAME-ORG MEMBERS SHARE (inferred, doa-importer-access.spec.ts:60-84): a member (Franklyn D) of 'IPAFFS Plant Organisation Test' submits -> another member (David D) of the same org CAN view, Copy-as-new and Amend it. Org membership, not authorship, governs visibility.
notes: Errors: 0. Duration 28.1s. Creator in THIS trace is a member (AUTH_FILES.b2cOrg1 / Isabel Irwin), so the org-selection page and Trade Partner badge do NOT render here — confirmed by the action timeline going straight from Import Type 'Save and continue' (action 11) to Country of origin select (action 12) with no org step. All agent-only surface is sourced from the QA spec + page objects (inferred) and the legacy review template (legacy). Reference number generated: CHEDPP.GB.2026.1525740 / customs GBCHD2026.1525740 / code C085. Commodity used: 06011010, single commodity, ROW origin Afghanistan, purpose Internal market.
